---
title: "Harder_Simulation"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-28"
---

```{r}

set.seed(100)

```

# Design
```{r}

reps <- 7 

treatments <- c("CG.3010", "CG.4010", "CG.4088", "CG.4288", "CG.4292", "G.202", "G.41", "G.814")

nsim <- 1000

p_values <- numeric(nsim)


```

```{r}
for (s in 1:nsim) {

  # Create RCBD layout
  dat <- expand.grid(
    Rep = factor(1:reps),
    Rootstock = factor(treatments)
  )

  # PARAMETERS under H0
  mu <- 0

  # block effects (beta_j)
  beta_j <- rnorm(reps, mean = 0, sd = 5)
  names(beta_j) <- levels(dat$Rep)

  # random error (epsilon_ij)
  eps <- rnorm(nrow(dat), mean = 0, sd = 10)

  # treatment effect tau_i = 0 under null
  tau_i <- 0

  # generate response
  dat$y <- mu +
           tau_i +
           beta_j[dat$Rep] +
           eps

  # ANOVA model
  fit <- aov(y ~ Rootstock + Rep, data = dat)

  # store p-value for treatment
  p_values[s] <- summary(fit)[[1]]["Rootstock", "Pr(>F)"]
}

# Type I error rate
mean(p_values < 0.05)
```
